nasb.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father’s brother; you shall not approach his wife, she is your aunt.

esv.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father’s brother, that is, you shall not approach his wife; she is your aunt.

cnv.text: 你不可揭露你叔伯的下體，不可親近他的妻子，她本是你的嬸母。

ccb.text: 不可与伯母或婶母乱伦而羞辱你伯父或叔父。
